welcome.title: Welcome to i-dblink
welcome.subtitle: A modern database management tool
features: Supports multiple databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, SQL Server, Oracle, etc.
Intuitive table data browsing and editing
Powerful SQL editor with auto-completion and explain plan
ER diagram visualization with automatic relationship detection
Data import/export supporting CSV, Excel, JSON formats
Connection management with grouping and color markers
